title: 10 best herbal capsules for eczema
intro_desc: Herbal capsules for eczema are dietary supplements that contain a variety of herbal extracts and natural ingredients, designed to alleviate the symptoms of eczema. These herbal remedies often include plant-based ingredients such as calendula, chamomile, and turmeric, which have anti-inflammatory and soothing properties that can help reduce redness, itching, and irritation associated with eczema. For example, calendula is known for its skin-healing properties, while chamomile has anti-inflammatory and anti-bacterial effects, and turmeric contains curcumin, a powerful antioxidant that can help reduce inflammation. By taking herbal capsules for eczema, individuals can experience relief from their symptoms and improve their quality of life, without the need for harsh prescription medications. For instance, a person who previously suffered from severe eczema outbreaks on their hands, causing pain and discomfort, may find that taking herbal capsules helps reduce the frequency and severity of these outbreaks, allowing them to perform daily tasks without discomfort.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Yarrow capsule helps with eczema because it contains anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that can reduce skin inflammation, irritation, and redness associated with eczema. The herb's active compounds, such as sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids, can help alleviate itching, promote wound healing, and strengthen the skin's barrier function. Additionally, yarrow has been shown to regulate the immune response, which can help prevent eczema flare-ups and reduce the severity of symptoms. By taking yarrow capsules, individuals with eczema may experience relief from their symptoms and improved skin health.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Yarrow capsules can reduce inflammation, which is important for eczema as it can alleviate redness, swelling, and itching. This property is due to the presence of flavonoids and sesquiterpene lactones.

Antimicrobial: Yarrow capsules can help fight off bacteria and viruses, which is important for eczema as it can prevent infections that can worsen the condition. This is attributed to the active constituents, such as alkaloids, tannins, and volatile oils.

Astringent: Yarrow capsules can help dry up excess fluid and reduce oozing, which is important for eczema as it can help manage weeping and oozing lesions. The astringent properties come from tannins and saponins.

Analgesic: Yarrow capsules can help alleviate pain and discomfort, which is important for eczema as it can reduce the pain and itching associated with the condition. This is due to the presence of alkaloids and flavonoids.

Immune-boosting: Yarrow capsules can help strengthen the immune system, which is important for eczema as it can help the body fight off triggers and reduce the frequency and severity of eczema flare-ups. This is attributed to the presence of polysaccharides and essential oils.
remedy_parts: Flowers: Rich in anti-inflammatory flavonoids, making them effective in reducing eczema-related redness and swelling.
Leaves: Contain anti-pruritic and anti-inflammatory properties, providing relief from itching and irritation associated with eczema.
Seeds: Packed with essential fatty acids, promoting skin barrier repair and reducing moisture loss in eczema-prone skin.
Stems: Contain tannins that have astringent properties, helping control eczema-related oozing and weeping.
Rhizomes: Source of anti-inflammatory compounds, alleviating skin inflammation and irritation in eczema.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Marshmallow capsule helps with eczema because it contains a high mucilage content that can soothe and protect inflamed skin. The anti-inflammatory and immune-boosting properties of marshmallow root can help reduce redness, irritation, and dryness associated with eczema. Additionally, marshmallow has been shown to have antimicrobial effects, which can help prevent skin infections that can exacerbate eczema symptoms. Furthermore, marshmallow can help to hydrate and moisturize the skin, reducing the itchiness and discomfort associated with eczema. Overall, marshmallow capsule can provide relief for eczema symptoms and support the skin's natural healing process.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Marshmallow capsules contain mucilage that helps reduce inflammation and soothes irritated skin, which is crucial for eczema as it is often characterized by inflamed, itchy skin.
Demulcent: The mucilage in marshmallow capsules forms a soothing film over the skin, providing relief from the dryness and discomfort associated with eczema.
Wound healing: Marshmallow capsules contain flavonoids and phenolic acids that promote wound healing, which is important for eczema as it can cause skin breakdown and infection.
Immune system support: Marshmallow capsules contain antioxidants that support the immune system, which is beneficial for eczema as it is often associated with a weakened immune response.

Antimicrobial: Marshmallow capsules have antimicrobial properties that can help prevent skin infections, which is important for eczema as the skin can become vulnerable to infection due to scratching and breakdown.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Marshmallow leaves are used in medicinal capsules for eczema due to their anti-inflammatory and soothing properties, which help alleviate skin irritation and redness.
Flowers: Marshmallow flowers are rich in mucilage, making them an effective demulcent that helps to reduce itching, inflammation, and dryness associated with eczema.
Seeds: Marshmallow seeds contain high levels of mucilage, which, when used in capsules, can help to form a protective barrier on the skin, locking in moisture and reducing eczema symptoms.

Roots: Marshmallow roots have been used in traditional medicine for their demulcent properties, providing relief from eczema symptoms by soothing and hydrating the skin, reducing inflammation and promoting skin repair.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Burdock capsule helps with eczema because it contains anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties that can alleviate the symptoms of this skin condition. Burdock has been shown to improve blood circulation, which can help eliminate toxins from the body and reduce inflammation. Additionally, burdock is rich in fatty acids and essential nutrients that can help soothe dry, itchy, and irritated skin. By promoting skin repair and regeneration, burdock capsules can help reduce the severity and frequency of eczema flare-ups, providing relief to those who suffer from this chronic skin condition.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Burdock capsules can help reduce inflammation in eczema due to the presence of active constituents like phenolic acids and quercetin.
Antioxidant: The antioxidant properties of burdock capsules, derived from arctiin and lignans, can help protect skin cells from oxidative stress and damage caused by eczema.
Antimicrobial: Burdock capsules have antimicrobial properties, thanks to the presence of tannins and essential oils, which can help control bacterial infections often associated with eczema.
Diuretic: Burdock capsules can help remove toxins from the body by promoting diuresis, which is important for managing eczema symptoms caused by toxin build-up.

Immune-modulating: Burdock capsules can help regulate the immune system, reducing the overactive immune response that can trigger eczema symptoms. This is attributed to the presence of polyacetylenes and lignans.
remedy_parts: Roots: Burdock roots contain anti-inflammatory properties that can help alleviate skin irritation and reduce eczema symptoms.
Leaves: Burdock leaves have been used in herbal medicine for their skin-soothing and potential antimicrobial effects, which may benefit eczema-prone skin.
Seeds: Burdock seeds are rich in essential fatty acids and contain anti-inflammatory compounds, making them useful for managing eczema-related redness and itching.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Pot marigold capsule helps with eczema because it contains anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that can reduce inflammation and combat infection, which are common symptoms of eczema. The herb's antioxidant properties can also help to soothe irritated skin, promote skin repair, and improve overall skin health. Furthermore, pot marigold is known to stimulate the production of white blood cells, which can boost the immune system and help the body to fight off allergens that can trigger eczema flare-ups. Overall, pot marigold capsules can provide a natural and effective way to manage eczema symptoms and promote skin health.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Pot marigold contains anti-inflammatory compounds like flavonoids and carotenoids, which help reduce inflammation and redness in eczema.
Wound-healing: The presence of active constituents such as triterpenoids and thiophenes in pot marigold promotes wound healing and skin regeneration, beneficial for eczema-prone skin.
Antimicrobial: Pot marigold has antimicrobial properties due to its essential oils and tannins, which help protect the skin from infection and support eczema treatment.
Immune-modulating: The herb's immune-modulating effects, attributed to its polysaccharides and alkaloids, can help balance the immune response and alleviate eczema symptoms.
Antipruritic: Pot marigold contains antipruritic compounds, such as quercetin and luteolin, that help relieve itching, a common and distressing symptom of eczema.
remedy_parts: Flowers: Pot marigold flowers are used in medicinal capsules for eczema due to their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties.
Leaves: The leaves of the pot marigold plant are used in medicinal capsules for eczema because of their soothing and healing effects on the skin.
Seeds: Pot marigold seeds are rich in antioxidants and are used in medicinal capsules for eczema to help reduce inflammation and promote skin repair.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: White tea capsule helps with eczema because it contains high levels of antioxidants and anti-inflammatory properties, which can reduce redness, irritation, and swelling of the skin. The polyphenols found in white tea have been shown to help strengthen the skin's natural defense mechanisms, improve skin health, and reduce the severity of eczema symptoms. Additionally, white tea has antibacterial properties that can help prevent skin infections, which are common in individuals with eczema. By taking white tea capsules, individuals with eczema may experience relief from their symptoms, improved skin health, and a reduction in the frequency and severity of eczema flare-ups.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: White tea contains high levels of antioxidants, such as flavonoids and polyphenols, which help reduce inflammation in the skin, providing relief from eczema symptoms.
Antimicrobial: White tea has antimicrobial properties due to its catechin content, which can help protect the skin from infection and support eczema healing.

Antioxidant: The high antioxidant content in white tea, particularly epigallocatechin gallate (EGCG), helps protect the skin from oxidative stress, promoting skin health and reducing eczema flare-ups.
Immune system support: White tea supports the immune system, which is crucial for managing eczema as it helps regulate the body's response to allergens and irritants.
Skin barrier repair: White tea's flavonoids and tannins help strengthen the skin's barrier function, reducing water loss and protecting the skin from irritants, thus alleviating eczema symptoms.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Contain high levels of antioxidants and anti-inflammatory properties, helping to reduce redness and irritation associated with eczema.
Buds: Rich in nutrients and antioxidants, buds can help soothe skin and support the immune system, reducing eczema symptoms.
Flowers: Packed with flavonoids and phenolic acids, flowers can help alleviate inflammation and promote skin healing in eczema patients.
Roots: Contain anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, helping to reduce eczema-related inflammation and fight off skin infections.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Cannabis capsule helps with eczema because it contains anti-inflammatory properties that can alleviate the redness, swelling, and itching associated with the skin condition. The cannabinoids in the cannabis, such as CBD, interact with the endocannabinoid system in the body, which regulates various functions including immune response and skin health. This interaction can help reduce inflammation and ease the symptoms of eczema. Additionally, the capsule form allows for a controlled and consistent dosage, ensuring effective and long-lasting relief. However, it is important to consult with a healthcare professional before starting any new treatment.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Cannabinoids such as CBD and THC found in cannabis capsules can help reduce inflammation in eczema by interacting with the endocannabinoid system, which plays a crucial role in regulating immune responses and reducing inflammation.
Immune modulation: Cannabis capsules containing balanced ratios of CBD and THC can help regulate the immune system, reducing the overactive immune response that contributes to eczema symptoms.

Pain relief: The analgesic properties of cannabinoids like CBD and THC can alleviate the itching and pain associated with eczema, improving the overall quality of life for those suffering from this skin condition.

Antipruritic: Cannabinoids, particularly CBD, have been shown to have antipruritic effects, helping to reduce the itchiness and irritation caused by eczema, which can lead to scratching and further skin damage.

Wound healing: The presence of cannabinoid receptors in the skin suggests that cannabis capsules may promote wound healing and tissue regeneration, potentially aiding in the recovery process for eczema-related skin damage.
remedy_parts: Flowers: The flowers of the cannabis plant contain high levels of cannabinoids, which have anti-inflammatory properties that can help reduce redness and irritation associated with eczema.

Leaves: The leaves of the cannabis plant contain therapeutic compounds, including flavonoids and terpenes, that have been shown to have soothing effects on the skin, making them beneficial for eczema treatment.
Seeds: Hemp seeds are rich in omega-3 and omega-6 fatty acids, which have anti-inflammatory properties that can help alleviate the symptoms of eczema and promote skin health.

Buds: Cannabis buds are the part of the plant that contains the highest concentration of cannabinoids, which have been shown to have immunosuppressive properties that can help reduce the immune system overactivity that contributes to eczema.
Stems: The stems of the cannabis plant contain fibers that can be used to make capsule casings, providing a natural and sustainable option for encapsulating medicinal compounds for eczema treatment.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Gotu kola capsule helps with eczema because it contains active compounds that have anti-inflammatory and wound-healing properties. These compounds can reduce redness, swelling, and itching associated with eczema. Additionally, gotu kola has been shown to improve skin hydration and elasticity, which can help alleviate the dry, scaly skin that often accompanies eczema. Furthermore, gotu kola may help regulate the immune response that contributes to eczema flare-ups. By addressing these underlying factors, gotu kola capsules can provide relief from eczema symptoms and support overall skin health.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Gotu kola helps reduce inflammation, which is important for eczema as it can alleviate redness, swelling, and itching. This property is attributed to the triterpenoid saponins present in gotu kola, particularly asiaticoside, madecassoside, and madasiatic acid.

Wound healing: Gotu kola promotes wound healing, which is crucial for eczema as it can help repair the damaged skin barrier. The triterpenoid saponins, along with other compounds like flavonoids and tannins, contribute to this property.

Antioxidant: Gotu kola has antioxidant properties that can help protect the skin from oxidative stress and damage, which is important for eczema as it can reduce inflammation and promote skin health. The flavonoids and phenolic acids in gotu kola are responsible for its antioxidant effects.

Antimicrobial: Gotu kola exhibits antimicrobial properties that can help prevent skin infections, which is important for eczema as it can reduce the risk of secondary infections. The essential oil components of gotu kola, such as ursolic acid and asiatic acid, have been found to have antimicrobial effects.

Immunomodulatory: Gotu kola can modulate the immune response, which is important for eczema as it can help regulate the overactive immune response that contributes to eczema symptoms. The triterpenoid saponins and flavonoids in gotu kola are believed to be responsible for its immunomodulatory effects.
remedy_parts: Leaves: The leaves of gotu kola are commonly used in medicinal capsules for eczema due to their anti-inflammatory and wound-healing properties.
Stems: Gotu kola stems are used in medicinal capsules for eczema because they contain triterpenoids, which have been shown to help reduce inflammation and promote skin repair.
Rhizomes: The rhizomes of gotu kola are used in medicinal capsules for eczema as they contain compounds that can help improve skin health, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: German chamomile capsule helps with eczema because it contains anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that can alleviate the symptoms of this skin condition. The active compounds in chamomile, such as alpha-bisabolol and matricin, have been shown to reduce inflammation, redness, and itching associated with eczema. Moreover, chamomile's antioxidant properties can help soothe irritated skin and promote healing. Additionally, chamomile has been found to have a calming effect on the nervous system, which can help reduce stress and anxiety that can exacerbate eczema symptoms. Overall, the herbal supplement can help manage eczema by providing anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and calming effects, thereby promoting skin health and reducing discomfort.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: German chamomile contains active constituents called bisabolol and chamazulene, which help reduce inflammation, providing relief from itchiness, redness, and swelling associated with eczema.

Antimicrobial: The essential oils and flavonoids present in German chamomile capsules have antimicrobial properties that help prevent skin infections, a common concern for individuals with eczema-prone skin.
Wound healing: German chamomile has been found to promote wound healing and tissue regeneration, which can help speed up recovery from eczema-related skin damage and lesions.

Antioxidant: The antioxidant properties of German chamomile, attributed to its flavonoid content, help protect the skin from oxidative stress and support overall skin health, which is essential for managing eczema symptoms.

Soothing and calming: German chamomile has a calming effect on the skin, reducing irritation and itchiness. This soothing property is mainly due to its bisabolol content, which helps alleviate discomfort and supports skin health in individuals with eczema.
remedy_parts: Flowers: The flowers of German chamomile are rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that can help soothe eczema symptoms.

Leaves: The leaves of German chamomile contain tannins and essential oils that have astringent and anti-inflammatory effects, making them useful for reducing redness and irritation associated with eczema.
Seeds: German chamomile seeds are a good source of essential fatty acids and vitamin B, which have moisturizing and anti-inflammatory properties that can help alleviate eczema symptoms.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Chicory capsule helps with eczema because it contains anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that can help reduce inflammation and irritation of the skin. Chicory is also rich in vitamins and minerals, such as vitamin C, vitamin E, and zinc, which are essential for skin health. These nutrients can help strengthen the skin's barrier function, reducing the risk of skin irritations and infections. Additionally, chicory has been shown to have antimicrobial properties, which can help prevent the growth of harmful bacteria on the skin. By supporting the skin's natural healing processes, chicory capsules can help alleviate the symptoms of eczema and promote overall skin health.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Chicory capsules contain active constituents like sesquiterpene lactones and polyphenols that help reduce inflammation, which is crucial in managing eczema symptoms.
Antioxidant: Chicory capsules have high levels of antioxidants, such as flavonoids and phenolic acids, that help protect the skin from oxidative stress and support skin health in eczema patients.

Immune-modulating: Chicory capsules can help regulate the immune response, thanks to compounds like inulin and fructans, which may help alleviate eczema symptoms caused by an overactive immune system.
Wound-healing: Chicory capsules contain compounds like tannins and saponins that promote wound healing and tissue regeneration, which can be beneficial for eczema-related skin damage.
Antimicrobial: Chicory capsules have antimicrobial properties due to the presence of essential oils and polyphenols, which may help control bacterial infections that can exacerbate eczema symptoms.
remedy_parts: Roots: Chicory roots contain high levels of antioxidants and have anti-inflammatory properties, making them useful for soothing eczema symptoms.
Leaves: Chicory leaves are rich in vitamins and minerals, and have been shown to have skin-healing properties, making them beneficial for eczema treatment.
Flowers: Chicory flowers contain flavonoids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making them useful for reducing redness and irritation associated with eczema.
Seeds: Chicory seeds are high in essential fatty acids and have moisturizing properties, making them helpful for alleviating dryness and itchiness caused by eczema.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Turmeric capsules helps with eczema because of its anti-inflammatory properties, which reduce redness and swelling associated with the condition. The active compound curcumin in turmeric also has antioxidant effects that soothe and calm irritated skin, promoting healthy digestion and immune function. Additionally, turmeric's natural antihistamine properties help alleviate itching and scratching, a common symptom of eczema. By taking turmeric capsules regularly, individuals with eczema can experience reduced inflammation, improved skin health, and increased overall well-being.
remedy_properties: Curcuminoids: Turmeric's active compound, curcuminoids, have potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in eczema-prone skin, alleviating symptoms such as redness, itching, and swelling.

Corticosteroid-like activity: Curcuminoids in turmeric capsules can mimic the effects of corticosteroids, reducing the production of pro-inflammatory molecules that exacerbate eczema, leading to a decrease in inflammation and discomfort.

Modulation of immune response: Turmeric's active compounds may help regulate the immune system's response to allergens and irritants, reducing the likelihood of an overactive immune response that can lead to eczema flare-ups.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: The rhyzomes of the turmeric plant contain a high concentration of curcuminoids, which have potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help alleviate symptoms of eczema.
Roots: Turmeric roots are rich in antioxidants and have been traditionally used to treat skin conditions such as eczema due to their ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing.
